title: Spatial · Minimum Chrome
thesis: Saved playgrounds live as cards positioned in 2D space. Pan/zoom is the only navigation. At idle there are five affordances — spotlight, zoom slider, launcher, fullscreen, settings — and no top bar; the canvas is the IA. Zoom into a tile and chrome materializes: a slim DevTools-style top bar, a corner widget that shows your canvas position (and is the door back), and one secondary pane with five tabs.
